title: Bridge Essay: A unified model of ketamine's dissociative and psychedelic properties.
concept: Psychedelics — DMN disruption, ego dissolution, altered states, predictive processing decoupling.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nonordinary Rendering** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Psychedelics — DMN disruption, ego dissolution, altered states, predictive processing decoupling.

**A unified model of ketamine's dissociative and psychedelic properties.** - J Psychopharmacol (2023). DOI: 10.1177/02698811221140011. PMID: 36527355. Ketamine is an N-methyl-d-aspartate antagonist which is increasingly being researched and used as a treatment for depression. In low doses, it can cause a transitory modification in consciousness which was classically labelled as 'dissociation'. However, ketamine is also commonly classified as an atypical psychedelic and it has been recently reported that ego dissolution experiences during ketamine administration are associated with greater antidepressant response.
